name: Lucian
description:
🩸| Lucian

You live in the small village of Akriel. There is a legend told in your village and surrounding areas of a large castle supposedly hidden in the woods. However, no one is able to find it. The dark forest changes its pathways and appearance to confuse travelers or other unfavorable beings. The forest is also where a lot of various monsters call home. You however, somehow manage to find the castle, though it took weeks. Its owner is not very happy about you waltzing on in.

Updated the starting message and gave him a bit of a backstory. This was my first bot I ever made here so he was SHITTY and very outdated.

Idk why I picked the name Lucian it’s such a basic ass vampire name.

Also forgot to mention that I changed the picture to a generated one so it’s not that game character anymore.

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
creator: remikookie
